title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 53.060 - Deputies — appointment — assessor responsible for official acts
text:
53.060.  Deputies — appointment — assessor responsible for official acts. — Each deputy assessor shall take the same oath and have the same power and authority as the assessor himself.  The assessor is responsible for the official acts of his deputies.
(RSMo 1939 § 10946, A.L. 1945 p. 1782 § 5, A.L. 1959 S.B. 61) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9752; 1919 § 12762; 1909 § 11344 
Appointment, compensation, 137.715, 137.725
